info.name: Shopify Dashboard API
info.description: All NestJS endpoints exposed by apps/api. Auth via JWT bearer. Login first → token auto-stored in {{access_token}}. Refresh via httpOnly cookie.

item.name: Admin API
item.description: Authenticated admin/dashboard endpoints. Require JWT via /auth/login.

body.raw:
{ "title": "About Us", "body_html": "

Our story

We sell premium snowboards since 2020.

", "handle": "about-us", "author": "Admin", "published": true }

request.description: Policy types: REFUND_POLICY, PRIVACY_POLICY, TERMS_OF_SERVICE, SHIPPING_POLICY, SUBSCRIPTION_POLICY, LEGAL_NOTICE, TERMS_OF_SALE, CONTACT_INFORMATION

item.name: Register file (after upload to staged URL)
16. Webhooks (Shopify → API)
item.description: Shopify POSTs here. HMAC verified with SHOPIFY_API_SECRET. Topic in URL uses dash instead of slash (orders/create → orders-create).

item.name: Storefront API
item.description: Public customer-facing Storefront API (no auth). Products, collections, cart, checkout.

item.name: 21. Storefront — Customer Account
item.description: Customer-facing self-service: profile, orders, returns, subscriptions, store credit. Auth via X-Customer-Token header (OAuth access token from Customer Account API login flow).

item.name: 20. Storefront (Public)
item.description: Public Storefront API — no auth. Customer-facing browse + cart + checkout via Shopify Storefront GraphQL.
